title: coussarea ovalis
intro: Coussarea ovalis, also known as the oval Coussarea, is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a medicinal plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant's medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. Coussarea ovalis can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to treat ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues.
